results.name: CN1 unitarity
results.detail: max ||U^dag U - I||_op = 4.219e-15 across a_tau in [1e-3, 1e-1]

results.name: CN2 per-step Neumann-series decay
results.detail: comm at d=2 scales as O(epsilon) relative to d=1, consistent with single-step v_LR_CN = v_LR(H)/(1 - a_tau J/2)

results.name: CN3 n-step velocity bound
results.detail: v_LR_CN = v_LR(H) / (1 - a_tau J / 2); reduces to v_LR(H) as a_tau -> 0

results.name: CN4 continuum convergence O(a_tau^2)
results.detail: O(a_tau^2) scaling verified in 4/4 successive halvings

results.name: CN5 LR-bound agreement with continuous evolution
results.detail: max |comm_CN - comm_exact| = 6.337e-07 at a_tau = 2.000e-03, O(a_tau^2) floor ~ 2.838e-04
